Metadata.ogTitle: Nayra Rios | Full Stack Developer & DevOps Engineer
Metadata.ogDescription: Check out my software development and security projects. Specialist in Kotlin, React, and pipeline automation.

summary.title: Professional Profile
summary.content: Software Developer with a hybrid focus between Full Stack development and DevOps engineering. Specialized in building robust applications with Kotlin (Spring Boot) and React/Next.js, with a strong emphasis on security throughout the development lifecycle (DevSecOps). My experience ranges from microservices architecture to cloud deployment automation, always striving for efficiency and scalability.
